extension.description: Manage implementation tasks on your git branch: subtasks, multiple Cursor chats per task, baseline git progress, and task-aware prompts.
commands.createTask.title: Create Task
commands.createSubtask.title: Create Subtask
commands.openTaskChat.title: Open Task Chat (new prompt)
commands.showTasksForCurrentBranch.title: Show Task Chats For Current Branch
commands.attachCurrentChatToTask.title: Attach Current Chat To Task
commands.changeTaskBranch.title: Change Task Branch
commands.openChat.title: Open in Cursor Chat
commands.copyPrompt.title: Copy Chat Prompt
commands.copyTaskPrompt.title: Copy Task Prompt
commands.archiveChat.title: Remove Chat From Task
commands.showCommitDiff.title: Show Changes Since Task Baseline
commands.showBranchDiff.title: Show All Branch Changes (vs base branch)
commands.renameChat.title: Rename Chat
commands.renameTask.title: Rename Task
commands.changeTaskStatus.title: Change Task Status
commands.archiveTask.title: Archive Task
commands.openTaskDetails.title: Open Task Details
commands.refreshYougile.title: Refresh YouGile Tasks
commands.selectYougileBoardFilter.title: Filter by Board
commands.openYougileTaskDetails.title: Open YouGile Task Details
config.databaseRelativePath.description: SQLite database path relative to the workspace folder (tasks, chats, checklist, attachments).
config.integration.source.description: Task source for the tree view: local SQLite tasks or YouGile API tasks.
config.yougile.assigneeId.description: Optional YouGile user ID. When set, only tasks assigned to this user are shown.
config.yougile.projectId.description: Optional YouGile project ID filter for tree data.
config.yougile.boardId.description: Optional YouGile board ID filter for tree data.
config.yougile.showEmptyColumns.descript: Show columns without tasks in YouGile integration mode.
config.yougile.showRawPayloadInDetails.d: Show raw JSON payload in the YouGile task detail card.
views.container.title: Task Chats
views.taskChats.name: Tasks
